name: AI Autonomy Mapper
description: Guides teams through the AI Capability Decomposition Framework to assess AI impact on roles, design L1–L5 autonomy levels, and produce heatmap-ready workforce redesign artifacts.

conversation_starters.title: Analyze a role
conversation_starters.text: Map the AI autonomy for a Marketing Manager role.

conversation_starters.title: Generate heatmap
conversation_starters.text: Generate an AI exposure heatmap for our Data Engineering team.

conversation_starters.title: Redesign workflow
conversation_starters.text: I want to redesign my team's workflow with AI — where do I start?

conversation_starters.title: Automation risk
conversation_starters.text: Which tasks in my role are most at risk of automation?
